import json
import random
import time
from datetime import datetime, timezone

def generate_dashboard_data():
    services = [
        "Authentication Service",
        "User Profile Service",
        "Product Catalog Service",
        "Order Processing Service",
        "Payment Gateway Service",
        "Notification Service",
        "Database Cluster",
        "API Gateway"
    ]

    statuses = ["Operational", "Degraded", "Major Outage", "Maintenance"]

    current_time_iso = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()

    dashboard_update = {
        "timestamp": current_time_iso,
        "services": []
    }

    for service_name in services:
        status = random.choices(
            statuses,
            weights=[0.85, 0.10, 0.03, 0.02],
            k=1
        )[0]

        metrics = {}
        if status == "Operational":
            metrics = {
                "cpu_utilization_percent": round(random.uniform(10, 40), 1),
                "memory_usage_percent": round(random.uniform(20, 60), 1),
                "disk_io_wait_ms": round(random.uniform(0.1, 1.0), 1),
                "network_latency_ms": random.randint(5, 50),
                "requests_per_sec": random.randint(1000, 5000),
                "error_rate_percent": round(random.uniform(0.01, 0.5), 2)
            }
        elif status == "Degraded":
            metrics = {
                "cpu_utilization_percent": round(random.uniform(60, 90), 1),
                "memory_usage_percent": round(random.uniform(70, 95), 1),
                "disk_io_wait_ms": round(random.uniform(1.0, 5.0), 1),
                "network_latency_ms": random.randint(50, 200),
                "requests_per_sec": random.randint(300, 1500),
                "error_rate_percent": round(random.uniform(1.0, 10.0), 2)
            }
        elif status == "Major Outage":
            metrics = {
                "cpu_utilization_percent": round(random.uniform(5, 20) if random.random() < 0.5 else random.uniform(80, 100), 1),
                "memory_usage_percent": round(random.uniform(10, 30) if random.random() < 0.5 else random.uniform(80, 100), 1),
                "disk_io_wait_ms": round(random.uniform(0.0, 10.0), 1),
                "network_latency_ms": random.randint(200, 1000) if random.random() < 0.7 else 9999,
                "requests_per_sec": 0,
                "error_rate_percent": 100.0
            }
        elif status == "Maintenance":
            metrics = {
                "cpu_utilization_percent": round(random.uniform(5, 20), 1),
                "memory_usage_percent": round(random.uniform(10, 30), 1),
                "disk_io_wait_ms": round(random.uniform(0.1, 0.5), 1),
                "network_latency_ms": random.randint(10, 50),
                "requests_per_sec": random.randint(0, 100),
                "error_rate_percent": round(random.uniform(0.0, 0.1), 2)
            }

        dashboard_update["services"].append({
            "name": service_name,
            "status": status,
            "metrics": metrics,
            "last_updated": current_time_iso
        })
    return dashboard_update

if __name__ == "__main__":
    data = generate_dashboard_data()
    print(json.dumps(data, indent=2))
    # To continuously generate data every 5 seconds, uncomment the following:
    # try:
    #     while True:
    #         data = generate_dashboard_data()
    #         print(json.dumps(data, indent=2))
    #         time.sleep(5)
    # except KeyboardInterrupt:
    #     pass
